sample_context.structure: Ag / BCP / PCBM / C60 / Ink / EDT / NiOx / ITO

notes: Fit strategy used: weighted_regions.
Displayed fit was switched to the recommended M-model baseline M3.
k is at the lower bound because the non-ohmic branch is effectively unused; increasing k has little effect near this solution, so interpret this as a no-k/weak-k fit rather than a request to raise k.
1 near-zero/noise-floor point(s) were excluded from aggregate error metrics.
Initialization switched from requested hybrid to lambert_w because it gave a better starting score.
Rs is weakly identifiable around the current solution; avoid over-interpreting it.
k is weakly identifiable around the current solution; avoid over-interpreting it.
Best strategy sweep candidate is weighted_regions with composite score 49.80.
Final fit uses the best profiled n/m values: n=2, m=3.2.
Best exponent-profile candidate is n=2, m=3.2 (mean 6.10%, max 15.66%).
Recommended baseline model is M3 (ohmic_leakage_only): diode + Rs + ohmic leakage; non-ohmic term held near zero.
Diagnostic ablation models were run separately and were not eligible to replace the M0-M3 baseline.

Nested leakage selection downgrades M2 to the no-k equivalent M3 (ohmic_leakage_only) because k is near its lower bound, non-ohmic contribution is <= 3%, full model improves BIC by < 2; full-vs-no-k BIC improvement is -4.39.
No post-fit model candidate cleared the replacement threshold; best non-legacy BIC candidate is clean_double_diode (BIC delta +226.20).
Best non-legacy mean-error improvement candidate is clean_double_diode (mean delta +4.86%, max delta +7.19%).
Clean M4 double-diode candidate is diagnostic-only; forward semilog evidence: single_slope_or_weak_contrast.
Core-window fit (-0.5 to 0.3 V) has mean 6.16% and max 15.20%; full extrapolation mean 6.16%.

advice.title: k reached the lower bound
advice.detail: A boundary hit usually means the selected model, voltage window, or parameter bound is controlling the answer.
advice.action: Treat this parameter as weakly identifiable; rerun with a narrower window or review the bound before assigning physical meaning.

advice.title: Some points were excluded from aggregate errors
advice.detail: 1 near-zero/noise-floor point(s) were excluded from aggregate error metrics.
advice.action: Inspect the error plot near 0 V; this is usually acceptable when currents are near the noise floor.

advice.title: Best exponent is at the scan edge
advice.detail: The best scanned m is 3.2, while the current grid spans 1.8 to 3.2.
advice.action: Expand the exponent grid before deciding that the value is physically meaningful.
